negative_cases.why_wrong: Task Stateful Threshold Update: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Task Stateful Threshold Update: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Task Stateful Threshold Update: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Task Stateful Threshold Update: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Task Stateful Threshold Update: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
